reviews.comment:
Excelente para renovar el registro internacional, pero había una empleada atendiendo a un señor mayor de muy mala manera, falta de empatía total, y la supervisora q escuchaba debería haber resuelto ella con el señor, ya q su compañera no tenía ganas

(Translated by Google)
Excellent for renewing the international registration, but there was an employee serving an elderly gentleman in a very bad manner, with a total lack of empathy, and the supervisor who was listening should have resolved the matter with the gentleman herself, since her colleague did not feel like it.

reviews.comment:
Qué mal tratan al Socio las dos señoras que están ahí!! Encima que el ACA no sube el monto de cobertura, pero sí sube la cuota de Socio sin avisar y uno se entera cuando está descontado automáticamente!!
Y ahora tampoco avisan que el aumento de la cuota del seguro es mensual, en vez de trimestral como antes..🤦🏻‍♀️
Y si uno va a hablar, encima lo tratan mal..😖por Dios genteeee!!!

(Translated by Google)
Those two ladies there treat members terribly! Not only does the ACA not increase the coverage amount, but they do raise the membership fee without warning, and you only find out when it's automatically deducted!
And now they don't even tell you that the insurance fee increase is monthly, instead of quarterly like before...🤦🏻‍♀️
And if you go to talk to them, they treat you badly...😖 Oh my God, people!!!
